zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Radcliffe II於1378年出生在英國藍卡爾拉德克利夫時，他的父親Sir John Radcliffe I of Ordsall46歲，母親Margaret de Trafford19歲。他於1395年3月13日與Clementina Standish結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1442年7月26日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾霍普享年64歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Radcliffe II于1378年出生在英国藍卡爾拉德克利夫时，他的父亲Sir John Radcliffe I of Ordsall46岁，母亲Margaret de Trafford19岁。他于1395年3月13日与Clementina Standish结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1442年7月26日在英国英格兰藍卡爾霍普享年64岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Radcliffe II was born in 1378, in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir John Radcliffe I of Ordsall, was 46 and his mother, Margaret de Trafford, was 19. He married Clementina Standish on 13 March 1395. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 26 July 1442, in Hope, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Manchester, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Radcliffe II est né en 1378, à Radcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Radcliffe I of Ordsall, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Trafford, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Clementina Standish le 13 mars 1395. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 26 juillet 1442, à Hope, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Radcliffe II 1378 in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Radcliffe I of Ordsall 46 und seine Mutter Margaret de Trafford 19. Er hat am 13. März 1395 Clementina Standish geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. Juli 1442 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Hope, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Manchester, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Radcliffe II è nato il nel 1378 nel Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Radcliffe I of Ordsall, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Trafford, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Clementina Standish il 13 marzo 1395. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 luglio 1442, nel Hope, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Manchester, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Radcliffe IIが1378年にイギリスランカシュアイアラドクリフで生まれた時，父Sir John Radcliffe I of Ordsallは46歳，母Margaret de Traffordは19歳であった。1395年3月13日にClementina Standishと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1442年7月26日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアホーペで64歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Radcliffe II(이)가 1378년 영국 랭카실르 라드클리프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Radcliffe I of Ordsall(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Trafford(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1395년 3월 13일 Clementina Standish(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1442년 7월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 홉에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Radcliffe II nasceu em 1378, em Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Radcliffe I of Ordsall, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Trafford, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Clementina Standish em 13 de março de 1395. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 26 de julho de 1442, em Hope, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Radcliffe II родился в 1378 г. в местности радклифф, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Radcliffe I of Ordsall было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Trafford, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Clementina Standish 13 марта 1395 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 26 июля 1442 г. в местности хоп, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Radcliffe II nació en 1378, en Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Radcliffe I of Ordsall, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Margaret de Trafford, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Clementina Standish el 13 de marzo de 1395. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de julio de 1442, en Hope, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
